WARNING: A2338 is MBP 13" M1 (820-02020). USB-C only (no MagSafe). Charger is Suona B379 (63W). Do NOT use A2681 test points.

scenarios.range: Board draws 5V but fails to negotiate 20V PD
scenarios.meaning: Board shows initial 5V draw but never negotiates to 20V. SoC may not be completing hard start, or CD3217 PD negotiation is failing.

steps.measure: Measure PPBUS_AON at output caps near F5200
steps.if_missing: Go to dcps_5v_triage — charger circuit not working at all.

steps.action: Verify PP3V8_AON from U5700 SVR AON
steps.if_missing: Check P3V8AON_PWR_EN (delayed enable from U5340, page 23). Check P3V8AON_FAULT_L — if LOW, U5700 fault. Check for shorts on PP3V8_AON branches (VDDMAIN, WLBT). Thermal image to find hot component.

steps.action: Verify PMU outputs needed for SoC hard start
steps.measure: PP1V8_S2 (MPMU BUCK 3) → 1.8V, PP1V25_S2 (SPMU BUCK 13) → 1.25V, PP3V3_AON (UC100) → 3.3V, PP1V8_AON (UC120) → 1.8V, PP0V805_S1_VDD_FIXED (SPMU LDO 12) → 0.805V, PP0V764_S1_SRAM (SPMU BUCK 5) → 0.764V, PPVDD_SOC_S1 (MPMU BUCK 2) → variable
steps.if_missing: Identify which PMU rail is missing/shorted. Check specific buck/LDO source. Thermal image for shorts.

steps.measure: PPVDD_PCPU_AWAKE (MPMU BUCK 0), PPVDD_GPU_AWAKE (MPMU BUCK 1), PP1V8_AWAKE (MPMU BUCK 3 SW1), PP1V25_AWAKE_IO (SPMU BUCK 13 SW3), PMU_ACTIVE_READY (page 34, 93)
steps.expected: All DVFS rails present. PMU_ACTIVE_READY asserted HIGH.
steps.if_missing: SoC not reaching hard start → potential SoC failure, or upstream S1/S2 rail marginal.

steps.action: Check PP5V_S2 and PP3V3_S2 (needed for CD3217)
steps.if_missing: PP5V_S2 missing: Check UC300 (LT8642S), P5VS2_PWR_EN, discharge QC420/RC423. PP3V3_S2 missing: Check UC710 (SN621371), P3V3S2_PWR_EN, discharge QC410/RC413.

steps.action: Check CD3217 specifically (if SoC hard start OK but no 20V)
steps.measure: UF400/UF500 power rails: PP3V3_S2_UPC, PP1V25_S2, PP1V8_S2. Internal LDO: PP1V5_UPC0_LDO_CORE. SPI ROM. USBC0/1 CC1/CC2 lines.
steps.expected: All CD3217 power rails present. CC lines communicating.
steps.if_missing: CD3217 replacement needed, or SPI ROM corrupted. Try other USB-C port first.

steps.measure: PP1V8_AWAKE at U1970, PP1V25_AWAKE_IO at level shifters U1974/U1983/U1992, SPI signals on scope
steps.expected: 1.8V at U1970, 1.25V at level shifters, SPI activity
steps.if_missing: U1970 dead or level shifter fault → replace SPI NOR. Board needs DFU restore.
